description: i² chain lands on −1, the conjugate product lands on 13 (purely real), and i(3+2i) lands on −2+3i — both coordinates verified
Coefficients before i (3i not i3), i^2 in middle steps, \left( \right) when i multiplies a grouped point, side-by-side parens for products
Each chain shows the distribution/expansion middle step where i² flips the sign — the mechanism, not just the result
Text and math read well; markers kept
